task_description: Phase 20: Real Trust & Safety (legal liability layer). Eliminate criminal-negligence risk of NoOp CSAM matcher. Build the safety stack that lets you ship UGC at all. Includes CSAM hash matching, perceptual hashing, text/image/video classification, live moderation, account integrity, appeals workflow, age gating, safety microfeatures, and DPIA documentation.

verification.summary: All 5 features implemented + semantic review fixes applied. @quant/moderation: 350 tests passing (27 test files), typecheck clean, build clean, lint clean (0 errors). @quant/moderation-worker: 26 tests passing (6 test files), typecheck clean.

review_fixes_applied: Phone OTP uses crypto.randomInt() instead of Math.random()
CSAM checkHash wrapped in try/catch - any error (including timeout) returns action=remove with csam_check_failed flag (fail-closed)
Video frame extraction gated on FFMPEG_ENABLED env var; logs warning when using mock backend
TextClassifier.mapToScoreCard documented as @deprecated when called without explicit response parameter
Grooming detector counts per-category keyword matches and boosts weight by Math.min(matchCount * 0.5, 1.5)
PhoneVerificationService JSDoc documents in-memory state limitation and need for external store in production
